other_observers: Scott Shaum found the bird, also seen by John Drummond and Brian Gibbons.; I saw it with Scott Shaum.
specific_location: Rose Pond, at Chico Basin Ranch
description: A colorful warbler dark throat, peach colored ear patch, two white wing bars, buffy underparts, short tail. See photos.Behaviors: Staying in the tall trees.Call: singing quite a lot, high pitched, not sure how it describe it.Plumage: first spring male
